title: "FTX Trial Update"
category: technology
---

# FTX Trial Update

Sam Bankman-Fried, the former CEO of FTX, appeared in court today. The trial has been ongoing since October 2023. FTX was a major cryptocurrency exchange before its collapse.

Caroline Ellison, former CEO of Alameda Research, testified against Bankman-Fried. Alameda Research was a trading firm closely linked to FTX.
